metadata.description: Self-hosted 21st.dev plugin marketplace for Codex. The official Codex plugin directory is not open yet, so add this marketplace by its git repo / URL directly.

plugins.name: 21st
plugins.description: Search, install and publish React/shadcn components, themes and templates on 21st.dev from your agent. Bundles the 21st-cli skill and wires up the remote 21st MCP server.
